entries.incident: Dry-run and dispatch artifacts dirtied main and blocked execute precheck.
entries.root_cause: Generated orchestrator artifacts were not separated from business dirty files.
entries.resolution: Make runner dry-run no-write and auto-commit event-first dispatch artifacts before execution.
entries.follow_up: Keep doctor classification for dispatch artifacts visible.

entries.incident: Successful run logs existed while task/result state stayed CLAIMED or MISSING.
entries.root_cause: Worker completion did not always materialize task-results and queue DONE state.
entries.resolution: Reconcile from run log, agent commit, and truthful result artifact without re-running agents.
entries.follow_up: Prefer event-first complete-task writes and doctor detection.

entries.incident: Natural-language tasks needed explicit router rules to avoid idle or misassigned agents.
entries.root_cause: Domain ownership lived in docs and scripts rather than a router-readable rule file.
entries.resolution: Introduce agent-router-rules.json and route-natural-language-task.mjs dry-run smoke.
entries.follow_up: Unify router rules with the V3 agent registry.

entries.incident: Duplicate and stale locks blocked V2 task execution.
entries.root_cause: Legacy lock JSON allowed multiple active rows for completed or replaced task states.
entries.resolution: Doctor detects duplicate, missing-task, and DONE-task locks; low-risk fix can remove safe rows.
entries.follow_up: Prefer event-derived locks and idempotent lock events.

entries.incident: Queue JSON and event read model could disagree during the event-first transition.
entries.root_cause: Event-first adoption was staged while compatibility JSON remained writable.
entries.resolution: Add event store health checks, rebuild dry-run, and consistency reporting in doctor.
entries.follow_up: Keep all state-changing scripts event-first before raising parallelism.
